prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: enemy animation source frame sheet for Orbwalker
Primary request: production candidate source frame sheet for enemy animation normalization later with sprite-pipeline.
Subject: the same dungeon enemy character shown in eight consistent full-body source frames: idle 1, idle 2, intent windup, attack strike, block/guard, hit reaction, stagger, defeat collapse. Same armor, proportions, weapon, and camera angle across all frames.
Scene/backdrop: simple neutral dark backdrop only, no environment detail.
Style/medium: polished stylized 2D fantasy game character sprite/pose art, animation-source friendly, crisp silhouette.
Composition/framing: 4x2 sheet, equal-sized cells, character centered with padding in each frame, no labels.
Lighting/mood: combat-readable gameplay source art, not final runtime integration.
Color palette: dark steel, worn leather, muted crimson cloth, small amber glow accents.
Constraints: no readable text, no labels, no logo, no watermark, no gore, no copyrighted characters, no casino imagery, avoid cropped limbs, keep identity consistent across all frames.
